message:
chore: import order fix and driver test coverage

useSnapshot.ts:
- Reorder imports (type import before React import per convention)

claude-driver.test.ts:
- Add test for history exactly at maxHistoryMessages limit (no pruning)
- Add test for multi-session isolation (pruning doesn't affect other agents)

acp-driver.test.ts:
- Additional test coverage for ACP driver

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
